data.body: CHECKPOINT: Fix implemented. Root cause: guard functions set ERR traps referencing function-local HOOK_ERROR_LOG; on happy-path return, the trap leaks into the caller scope in pre-bash.sh. When _pre_bash_dispatch returns 2, the leaked trap fires and produces spurious errors. Fix: use || to suppress ERR on dispatch call + trap - ERR EXIT to clear before exit. RED test added. All tests GREEN (18 passed).
